# ParagonBoardDefinition.BoardIndex property

The per-class board ordinal — the SNO name's trailing integer (`Paragon_Warlock_03` → `3`; `Paragon_Spirit_0` → `0`), or `-1` if decoded byte-only. See [`ClassSnoId`](./ClassSnoId.md) for the convention/boundary.

```csharp
public int BoardIndex { get; }
```
